summary: Ukrainian forces repelled mechanized assaults on Novopavlivka and Dobropillia fronts, destroying enemy tanks with support from Lasar’s Group NSU and adjacent units. Russian forces, via the Rubicon Center, intercepted over 1,500 fixed-wing UAVs and downed 107 targets on March 6-7, 2026, using FPV drones and air defense systems. Iran’s Missile 358 subsonic loitering air defense missiles, equipped with thermal imaging homing heads, proved effective against Israeli Hermes-900 UAVs. Ukraine launched Mission Control, a unified digital system for drone operations, to enhance battlefield coordination. Ukrainian drone crews face challenges meeting monthly kill targets due to reduced enemy presence within range, prompting calls to expand the kill zone deeper into Russian-held territory.
